title: turnera aromatica
intro: Turnera aromatica, also known as Damiana, is a plant native to the Americas that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. It is a shrub with small yellow flowers and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and estrogenic effects. The health benefits of Turnera aromatica include relief from menopausal symptoms, improved libido, and enhanced mood, as well as potential benefits for digestive health and anxiety reduction. Turnera aromatica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional medicine to make infusions and ointments.
